title: What tool do we use to test our connection to the target with an ICMP echo request?
description: A ping (or simply "ping") is a network diagnostic tool used to test connectivity between a source device and a target server. It sends Internet Control Message Protocol (ICMP) Echo Request packets to an IP address, measuring the round-trip time (latency) in milliseconds and identifying packet loss to verify if a server is online or troubleshooting network issues.
